LightningComponentBundle.description: Reusable upload button that opens a file dialog and links uploaded files to the supplied Account record.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Account Id
property.description: The Account Id that uploaded files should be linked to. On a record page, this is automatically supplied.

property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button Label
property.description: Text shown on the upload button when not in icon-only mode.

property.name: iconOnly
property.label: Icon-only Button
property.description: When enabled, render only the icon (use for compact 'i' style buttons).

property.name: variant
property.label: Button Variant
property.description: Standard SLDS button variant: brand, neutral, destructive, success, etc.

property.name: allowMultiple
property.label: Allow Multiple Files
property.description: If true, the user can upload more than one file at a time.

property.name: helpText
property.label: Help Text
property.default: Select one or more files from your device. Uploaded files will be linked to this Account.

property.name: accept
property.label: Accepted File Extensions
property.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions (e.g. .pdf,.doc,.png). Leave blank for default set.
